# Franclloyd D. Dagdag — Full-Stack Web Developer

> Portfolio of Franclloyd D. Dagdag, a full-stack web developer from the Philippines
> specializing in scalable system architecture, complex problem solving, and precision
> engineering. Builds end-to-end products across React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, and
> Laravel, with a focus on performance, maintainability, and clean system design.

Franclloyd has shipped government-scale platforms (Internal Audit Management System,
Procurement Management System, blockchain-backed financial audit) and rebuilt client
web presences for speed and SEO. B.S. Information Technology, Caraga State University
(magna cum laude, 2023).

## Pages

- [Home / Portfolio](https://www.daggerbuilds.com/): Overview, skills, experience, featured projects, and contact.
- [Blog — Case Studies](https://www.daggerbuilds.com/blog): Index of in-depth case studies on real client work.
- [Acro Refrigeration Case Study](https://www.daggerbuilds.com/blog/acro-refrigeration): Migrating a 50+ year Australian refrigeration company from a slow WordPress site to a Next.js + Supabase platform with a custom CMS — 100+ blog posts migrated, ~10x faster load times, and zero SEO regression.
- [WordPress vs. Hardcoded](https://www.daggerbuilds.com/blog/wordpress-vs-hardcoded): A field-notes breakdown contrasting WordPress with hand-built, hardcoded websites — where custom code gains its edge in speed, security, SEO, and ownership, and how WordPress becomes a disadvantage over the long run.

## Skills

- Frontend: React, Next.js, shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS, Flutter
- Backend: Node.js, Python, Laravel
- Data: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Firebase, Supabase
- Other: Web3, Docker, WordPress, SEO
